title: ebenus javanica
intro: Ebenus javanica, also known as the Java hawthorn or Javan hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Ebenus javanica include lowering cholesterol levels, improving heart health, and reducing blood pressure. Ebenus javanica is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
